epics.title: Q2 Scale Platform to 1M Concurrent Users with Low Latency
epics.description: Plan and execute targeted scalability enhancements to reliably support 1,000,000 concurrent users while maintaining backwards compatibility and zero-downtime releases. Scope includes capacity assessment, horizontal scaling, traffic routing across 3 regions, caching/CDN tuning, and end-to-end performance testing. Measurable outcomes by end of Q2: (1) Demonstrate capacity for 1,000,000 concurrent users in pre-production with P95 response time ≤ 300ms and error rate ≤ 0.1%; (2) Activate autoscaling and global traffic routing across 3 regions to enable market expansion; (3) Complete rollout with zero customer-visible downtime and full backwards compatibility verified via regression testing; (4) Stay within allocated Q2 scaling budget envelope without exceeding departmental budget. Work will be performed by the existing team (no net new hires).
epics.business_value: Unlocks revenue growth and entry into new markets by handling significantly higher demand with strong user experience, directly supporting $10M ARR, market expansion, and higher customer satisfaction through faster, more reliable performance.

objectives.title: Prove lightning-fast, error-free performance at 1M concurrent in pre-production
objectives.description: Demonstrate the platform can reliably sustain 1,000,000 concurrent users with low latency and minimal errors through targeted performance tuning, caching/CDN optimization, and end-to-end load testing.

key_results.description: Sustain 1,000,000 concurrent users for ≥15 minutes in pre-production
Reduce P95 response time under 1M concurrent to ≤300ms in pre-production
Lower error rate under 1M concurrent to ≤0.1% in pre-production
Increase global CDN/cache effectiveness to reduce origin load and latency

objectives.title: Deliver resilient, globally distributed traffic and zero-downtime releases
objectives.description: Activate autoscaling and global traffic routing across 3 regions, ensure rapid failover and zero customer-visible downtime, and verify full backwards compatibility via robust regression testing.

key_results.description: Enable autoscaling on all stateless services
Route production traffic across 3 regions with health-based balancing
key_results.metric: Production traffic served via multi-region routing

key_results.description: Achieve zero customer-visible downtime for all Q2 releases
Verify full backwards compatibility via automated regression
key_results.metric: Critical API regression test pass rate

key_results.description: Improve regional failover recovery time during drills

objectives.title: Scale efficiently within budget while accelerating developer delivery
objectives.description: Optimize cost-to-serve at scale, meet 99.99% reliability targets, and enhance CI/CD and developer productivity while reducing high-priority technical debt.

key_results.description: Lower cost-to-serve at scale
key_results.metric: Cloud cost per 1k requests at 1M concurrent

key_results.description: Keep total Q2 scaling spend within budget envelope
Meet 99.99% uptime SLO across core services
Speed up delivery by reducing median lead time for changes
key_results.metric: Median lead time for changes (commit to prod)

key_results.description: Reduce high-priority tech debt by 30%

dependencies: Cloud provider quota and budget approvals for multi-region capacity
CDN/global traffic routing contract and configuration
Data access optimization plan approved (backwards compatible)
Security and compliance review for multi-region traffic
Monitoring and performance test environment readiness

epics.title: Q2 Reliability & Zero-Downtime Program to Achieve 99.99% Uptime
epics.description: Implement resilience upgrades and release safeguards to achieve 99.99% monthly uptime with zero-downtime deployments. Scope includes multi-region failover readiness, health checks, automated rollback with progressive rollouts, incident runbooks, on-call improvements, and observability enhancements. Measurable outcomes by end of Q2: (1) 99.99% monthly uptime on customer-facing endpoints measured by external monitoring; (2) Mean Time to Recovery ≤ 30 minutes on critical incidents; (3) 100% of releases use progressive rollout and automated rollback; (4) Reduce P1 incidents by 50% vs Q1 baseline; (5) Zero customer-visible downtime during all Q2 deployments. Work aligns with backwards compatibility requirements and uses existing team capacity.
epics.business_value: Improves customer trust and reduces churn by minimizing outages, directly supporting 95% customer satisfaction and enabling reliable expansion to new markets, which contributes to ARR growth.

objectives.title: Make every release safe and seamless with zero customer-visible downtime
objectives.description: Deliver zero-downtime deployments through progressive rollouts, automated rollback, and strong release guardrails to ensure reliable, backward-compatible releases across all services.

key_results.description: Increase production releases using progressive rollout with automated rollback enabled
Expand automated rollback coverage across tier-1 services
Reduce the change failure rate for production releases
key_results.metric: Change failure rate (incidents caused by releases / total releases)

key_results.description: Eliminate customer-visible downtime during deployments

objectives.title: Harden platform resilience to reliably deliver 99.99% uptime
objectives.description: Achieve multi-region failover readiness, comprehensive health checks, and complete external monitoring to keep customer-facing endpoints available at four nines.

key_results.description: Increase monthly uptime on customer-facing endpoints measured by external monitoring
Reduce time to failover to secondary region during game-day simulations
key_results.metric: Failover time to secondary region (tier-1 services)

key_results.description: Enable active-active multi-region with automated health checks for tier-1 services
Achieve full external monitoring coverage for customer-facing endpoints

objectives.title: Respond and recover fast: halve P1 incidents and drive MTTR to 30 minutes or less
objectives.description: Elevate incident readiness with tested runbooks, improved on-call, and actionable observability to minimize impact and restore service rapidly.

key_results.description: Reduce Mean Time to Recovery for critical incidents
Cut P1 incident volume by half compared to Q1 baseline
Ensure runbooks are complete, up-to-date, and tested for all tier-1 services
Improve median on-call acknowledgment time for P1 pages

dependencies: Observability tooling upgrades (alerting, dashboards, synthetic checks)
Updated release management policy for progressive rollout and rollback
Service ownership and runbooks finalized across teams
Disaster recovery and failover playbooks approved
Customer Support alignment on incident communications
Readiness of multi-region infrastructure from scalability work

epics.title: Q2 Developer Experience Upgrade & 30% Technical Debt Reduction
epics.description: Elevate developer productivity and reduce technical debt to accelerate delivery while maintaining backwards compatibility. Scope includes refactoring the top high-risk code areas, improving automated test coverage on critical paths, optimizing CI/CD to cut build and verification times, and adding quality gates. Measurable outcomes by end of Q2: (1) Reduce technical debt by 30% from Q1 baseline using a standardized internal Tech Debt Index; (2) Cut CI/CD pipeline time by 50% (average build+test ≤ 10 minutes); (3) Increase automated test coverage on critical paths to ≥ 80%; (4) Improve deployment frequency to at least daily with change failure rate < 5% and zero-downtime procedures; (5) Reduce lead time for changes by 40% (DORA metric). All work leverages feature flags and progressive releases to ensure backwards compatibility, and fits within the existing team and budget constraints.
epics.business_value: Accelerates time-to-market for revenue-impacting features, lowers maintenance costs, and improves product quality, supporting entry into 3 new markets, $10M ARR, and higher customer satisfaction through fewer defects and faster delivery.

objectives.title: Retire high-risk technical debt to unlock developer velocity and quality
objectives.description: Systematically reduce technical debt in the highest-risk code areas using the standardized Tech Debt Index, improving code health and lowering defect risk to accelerate safe delivery.

key_results.description: Reduce aggregate Tech Debt Index (TDI) from Q1 baseline by 30%
Increase proportion of top 10 high-risk components with ≥25% TDI improvement
Reduce static analysis code smells in prioritized modules
Lower defect density in refactored high-risk modules

objectives.title: Make CI/CD blazing fast and bulletproof for safe, zero‑downtime releases
objectives.description: Optimize build and verification, enforce quality gates, and adopt progressive, zero-downtime deployment patterns to increase deployment frequency while reducing change failures.

key_results.description: Cut average CI pipeline duration (build+test) by 50% to ≤10 minutes
Increase deployment frequency to at least daily
Reduce change failure rate to <5%
Enforce mandatory quality gates (lint, tests, coverage ≥80%, SAST) across repos
key_results.metric: Repos with mandatory CI quality gates enabled

key_results.description: Adopt zero-downtime deployment patterns (blue/green or canary with feature flags)

objectives.title: Raise test rigor on critical paths to enable faster, safer releases
objectives.description: Strengthen automated testing on critical user and system flows to increase coverage, reduce flakiness, and shorten lead time for changes without sacrificing reliability.

key_results.description: Increase automated test coverage on critical paths
Reduce lead time for changes (DORA) by 40%
Lower flaky test rate to ≤2% to stabilize build verification
Reduce critical path defect escape rate to production

dependencies: Quality tooling configured (static analysis, coverage reporting, quality gates)
Feature flag service and guidelines for safe rollouts
Architecture review and approval of refactoring scope
Alignment with release and observability practices from reliability program

department.name: Engineering
strategic_goals: Scale platform to support 1 million concurrent users
Improve system reliability and uptime to 99.99%
Enhance developer productivity and CI/CD pipeline
